name: Ellen's Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
CRUST:
Mix together the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press into a 9-inch springform pan.
FILLING:
Cream together the softened cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add in one egg yolk at a time, then add the sour cream and extracts. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form, then gently fold them into the mixture.
Place the cake in a preheated oven set to 325°F (160°C) and bake for 1 hour. Turn off the oven and allow it to cool with the door open for an additional hour. Then open the door again and let the cake continue to cool for another half hour before removing it from the oven and allowing it to cool completely.
